headline: Schwab explains why a cheap-looking stock could be a trap
summary: Charles Schwab’s research team published a detailed breakdown of how the P/E ratio works and, more critically, the specific scenarios where a low P/E can mislead even experienced investors into what the market calls a value trap. The S&P 500's trailing P/E ratio currently sits near 26, well ...
